---
title: "Anupam Manur"
subtitle: "Professor | Author | Economist"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/anupam-profile.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/anupammanur
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anupam-manur/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:anupam@takshashila.org.in
---

## About Me

I am a Professor of Economics at the [Takshashila Institution](https://takshashila.org.in), where I research on various facets of economic policy. I'm also the Managing Editor of the [Indian Public Policy Review](ippr.qmd) and co-author of *We, the Citizens*, a graphic novel on public policy. My personal claim to fame is that I can make almost anyone like economics!

## What I Do

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### Research & Writing
I write about economic policy, trade, platform economics, and bioeconomy. My work appears in various newspapers and other publications.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Teaching
I teach economics and public policy at the [Takshashila Institution](courses.qmd).
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Indian Public Policy Review
I am the Managing Editor of [IPPR](ippr.qmd), a peer-reviewed, open-access journal on Indian public policy.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Books
I co-authored [*We, the Citizens*](books.qmd), a graphic novel that decodes public policy in the Indian context.
:::

:::

```{=html}
<div class="home-search-bar">
  <button class="home-search-trigger" onclick="
    var el = document.querySelector('#quarto-search button') ||
             document.querySelector('.aa-DetachedSearchButton') ||
             document.querySelector('[title=Search]');
    if (el) { el.click(); }
  ">
    <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='16' height='16' fill='currentColor' viewBox='0 0 16 16' style='margin-right:0.5rem;vertical-align:-2px'><path d='M11.742 10.344a6.5 6.5 0 1 0-1.397 1.398h-.001q.044.06.098.115l3.85 3.85a1 1 0 0 0 1.415-1.414l-3.85-3.85a1 1 0 0 0-.115-.099zm-5.242 1.156a5.5 5.5 0 1 1 0-11 5.5 5.5 0 0 1 0 11'/></svg>
    Search posts, op-eds, publications…
  </button>
</div>
```

## Recent Writings

::: {#recent-writings}
:::

```{=html}
<a href="op-eds/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">View all op-eds →</a>
```
